overall.description: A stationary first-person view in a block-style video game during a heavy rainstorm at night. The scene shows a fortified wooden village house with overhanging roof elements on the left, a fenced foreground area, and dark forested background, with continuous rainfall reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy village exterior with fortified house

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the rain observing the wooden house and surrounding area

entered.detail: multi-story wooden structure with overhanging roof and vertical fence posts along the roof edge
vertical wooden posts in the foreground, possibly fence or crop supports
dense dark trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene in a video game village during a heavy rainstorm. The camera faces a fortified wooden house with distinctive roof architecture on the left, while wooden posts line the foreground and dark forest fills the background. Rain falls continuously throughout the clip with no significant changes in the environment or camera position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a fortified wooden village house during a relentless nighttime rainstorm. It begins with a view of the house's distinctive overhanging roof architecture on the left, while wooden posts frame the immediate foreground. As the heavy rain continues to fall, the visibility remains limited, casting the dense forest in the background into deep shadow. The scene persists in this atmospheric stillness, with the constant downpour serving as the only movement against the dark, blocky environment.
